ppfd_source_note: Official VIVOSUN value provided: PPFD 630 µmol/(m²·s) at 30.5 cm; PPFD is stored separately from PPF.
notes: Official product page: 100W, 2x2 ft coverage; integrated fan; PPF/PPE not listed Official VIVOSUN values: efficacy 2.75 µmol/J; PPFD 630 µmol/(m²·s) at 30.5 cm. PPF 275 µmol/s derived from 100 W × 2.75 µmol/J; PPFD kept separate from PPF.
uvp_notes: Official US collection shows $99.99 current / $139.99 retail price
